items.title: Going for broke in Cleveland
items.body_excerpt: Amid loud conversation about fear of the second apron, the only team over that threshold in 2025-26 signs up for potential further flirtation with it in the coming years. What are the Cavaliers cooking up? Good morning. The World Cup is back today. And big Summer League games…

items.title: From Dybantsa vs. Peterson to Yang Hansen: My 2026 Summer League Watch List
items.body_excerpt: Today marks the official start of the 2026 NBA Summer League in Las Vegas, with games tipping off through July 19. For me, Summer League has become one of the must watch events on the NBA calendar. Unfortunately, I won’t be in attendance this year, as I’m still living in Paris.…

items.title: The Secret Reason America Is About to Take Back Basketball
items.body_excerpt: America’s soccer futility has led me to shockingly good news for the USA in another sport. I’ll set the table with a viral lament from a U.S. men's national soccer team fan who cites America’s slide from past basketball dominance . I’ve heard people say “well we don’t have an…
